one_time_description: Change in accounting for First Nation partnership (Gwabalis Fisheries Society removed from equity method investments)
economic_notes: Nation holds investments in Quatsino Economic Development Limited Partnership (99.9%), Quatsino First Nation Economic Development Corporation Ltd. (wholly-owned), and Gilakasla Kwa Holdings Ltd. (33%). QEDLP owns Quatsino Marine Limited Partnership, Quattishe Limited Partnership and Quatern Limited Partnership. Operations include arcade, forestry, wind farm, and fishing activities.
notes: Audit is qualified because financial statements for Quatsino Economic Development Limited Partnership and Quatsino Economic Development Corporation Ltd. were not available at audit report date (December 31, 2021 year-end entities). A change in accounting for a First Nation partnership (Gwabalis Fisheries Society) resulted in a $1,023,190 reduction to accumulated surplus. CMHC Housing is fully consolidated. Three entities (QEDLP, QFN Economic Development Corp, Gilakasla Kwa Holdings) are accounted for by modified equity method. Total housing expenses combine Schedule 7 ($39,316) and Schedule 8 CMHC ($368,677). Natural Resources expenses ($613,745) included in Schedule 9 but not mapped to standard categories. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, FNHA, DFO, CMHC, Province of BC, FNESC, NVIAMS government transfers.
